name: RADIANT - Detection to Recovery
description: Automated IR: Suricata alert → pfSense block → MISP event → Recovery
setup_notes: 1. Import this file: Shuffle UI -> Workflows -> Import
2. Set MISP_KEY to your MISP auth key (MISP -> My Profile -> Auth key)
3. Install pfSense API package: System -> Package Manager -> pfsense-api
4. Set PFSENSE_KEY to pfSense API key

actions.name: 1-Detection
actions.description: Suricata alert received via Kibana Watcher webhook

actions.name: 2-Containment
actions.description: POST to pfSense API - add block rule for src_ip

actions.name: 3-Eradication
actions.description: POST to MISP API - create event with IOCs + ATT&CK tags

actions.name: 4-Wait
actions.description: Wait 300 seconds - confirm no further C2 activity

actions.name: 5-Recovery
actions.description: DELETE pfSense block rule - PUT MISP event to resolved
